FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Risk-on Momentum and Strong Fed‑Fed Divergence
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised higher on risk‑on sentiment and Fed‑Fed divergence with 145.00 as crucial support.
FX.comment: Strong risk‑on momentum and Fed‑BOJ yield divergence support an upward bias.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] [UP] [Positive technical bias supported by macro resilience and earnings catalysts] (e.g. '[S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish')
tldr_points: Structural support aligned with 20-day moving average underpins near-term upside.
Historical forecasting tool signals low crash probability amid pro-growth policy.
Earnings upgrades in financials and selective sectors reinforce positive risk appetite.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 maintains structural support with favorable macro and earnings catalysts reducing crash risk.
STOCKS.comment: Technical support and macro resilience favor upside continuation with low crash probability.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Detects Weakening Momentum Amid Regulatory Headwinds
tldr_points: Liquidity thinning observed across order books
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory pressure and deteriorating order flow push BTC/USD lower; entry near $28.5k with tight risk.
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory headwinds and overbought momentum justify a short bias.
